summary: Completed testing of Razorpay Standard Checkout integration. All 38 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend checkout flow working correctly with PAY ₹X button, order summary, and proper mobile responsiveness. Payment success/failed pages render correctly with all required elements.
critical_code_review_comments: Razorpay Standard Checkout correctly implemented with checkout.js
POST /api/create-razorpay-order returns order_id, amount, currency, key_id correctly
POST /api/verify-payment returns 400 for missing fields as expected
Checkout page shows 'PAY ₹X' button with correct total amount
Order summary displays product name, variant, quantity, and price
Customer details section shows name and location
Payment success page shows success icon, heading, invoice notice, and Shop Again button
Payment failed page shows failure icon, empathetic message, Try Again and Back to Store buttons
Mobile responsiveness verified at 390px - all elements visible and properly sized
Razorpay modal behavior (handler/ondismiss callbacks) cannot be tested in headless browser - expected limitation
test_credentials: No auth required. Razorpay test key: REDACTED_KEY
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 tested Razorpay Standard Checkout integration: 1) POST /api/create-razorpay-order creates order and returns order_id, amount, currency, key_id, 2) POST /api/verify-payment returns 400 for missing fields, returns verified:false for invalid signature, 3) Checkout page shows PAY ₹X button with data-testid='pay-now-button', 4) Order summary shows product details, 5) Payment success page has success-heading, success-icon, invoice-notice, shop-again-button, 6) Payment failed page has failure-heading, failure-icon, empathetic message, try-again-button, back-to-store-button, 7) Mobile responsiveness verified at 390px, 8) Entry→Store→Cart→Checkout flow works end-to-end. Note: Razorpay modal cannot be tested in headless browser.

features_tested.create_razorpay_order_api: PASS - Returns order_id, amount, currency, key_id
features_tested.checkout_page_order_summary: PASS - Shows product name, variant, quantity, price
features_tested.payment_success_page: PASS - All elements visible (success-icon, success-heading, invoice-notice, shop-again-button)
features_tested.payment_failed_page: PASS - All elements visible (failure-icon, failure-heading, empathetic message, try-again-button, back-to-store-button)
features_tested.mobile_responsiveness_checkout: PASS - All elements visible at 390px width
